nodes.title: Display Login Form
nodes.description: When /login page loads, display login form with username and password fields, and a 'تسجيل الدخول' submit button. Form includes validation: both fields are required. If user is already logged in (token exists), redirect to /businesses.

nodes.title: Submit Login Credentials
nodes.description: When user clicks 'تسجيل الدخول' button, triggers POST /api/auth/login with {username, password}. UI shows loading spinner on button. Success: stores JWT token in localStorage, redirects to /businesses. Failure: shows error toast 'اسم المستخدم أو كلمة المرور غير صحيحة'.

nodes.title: Protect Authenticated Routes
nodes.description: When user navigates to any /biz/* route without valid JWT token in localStorage, auth guard redirects to /login. When token exists, allows navigation. When token is expired or invalid, clears token and redirects to /login.

nodes.title: Select Business
nodes.description: When /businesses page loads, fetch GET /api/businesses and display list of businesses as cards. When user clicks a business card, navigate to /biz/:bizId dashboard. If no businesses exist, show 'لا توجد أعمال' message.
